ham.subject: Out of Office: John Smith
ham.body:
Hello,

Thank you for your email. I am currently out of the office with limited access to email from 2026-04-10 to 2026-04-15. I will respond to your message when I return. If you need immediate assistance, please contact Sarah at sarah@company.com or call 555-1234.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
John

spam.subject: Urgent: Microsoft 365 Password Expiry Notice
spam.body:
Dear User,

Your Microsoft 365 account password is set to expire in 48 hours. To avoid any interruption to your services, please verify your credentials immediately by clicking the secure link below. Failure to act will result in a forced account lockout and loss of access to all corporate resources.

<URL>

If you have already updated your password, please disregard this message.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Regards,
Microsoft Support Team
